title: benzoin supracostatum
intro: Benzoin supracostatum, also known as Styrax tonkinensis, is a plant species that belongs to the Styrax family, commonly found in Southeast Asia. The plant's resin, which is extracted from its bark, has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of benzoin supracostatum include reducing pain and inflammation, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and promoting wound healing. The plant's resin is often used in herbal preparations, including topical creams, ointments, and essential oils, which are used to relieve muscle and joint pain, as well as to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
